name: python3-tempora
title: python3-tempora
summary: Python objects and routines pertaining to date and time
description:
Python objects and routines pertaining to date and time
Tempora is a set of Python objects and routines pertaining to date and
time.
.
Besides the top level package module (tempora), it includes:
* timing: routines for measuring and profiling.
* schedule: an event scheduler.
* utc: routines for getting datetime-aware UTC values.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-tempora because Python objects and routines pertaining to date and time.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-tempora as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-tempora with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-tempora --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
